_comment: Expect matchers a monitor spec is allowed to use.
WHY: the runner's spec shim implements a SUBSET of @playwright/test's expect matchers;
a spec using an unimplemented matcher passes local `npm run check` but fails AT RUNTIME
in the runner (the check-80 / toBeNull incident, 2026-06-29). This gate fails CI instead.
★ SLOT — REPLACE WITH THE RUNNER'S IMPLEMENTED-MATCHER LIST: the values below are the
2026-07-04 census of what the fleet currently USES (5 matchers, 47 call sites), i.e. a
ratchet against NEW matchers sneaking in. When the runner session lands the shim's
actual implemented-matcher list, replace `allowed` with that list (it is the real
contract; this census is only its lower bound).
